summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Artizen Café website for all 15 specified features. All features verified via Playwright browser automation. Website is fully functional with all new features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 features verified. Hero carousel: 4 slides (data-testid hero-dot-0 through hero-dot-3), first slide 'More Than a Café — It's an Experience', prev/next buttons (hero-prev-btn, hero-next-btn) work, auto-advances. Experiences: 4 bento grid cards with real café photos. Gallery: 18 real images in masonry layout. Reels ('Life at Artizen'): 13 Instagram embed iframes in horizontal scroll, prev/next buttons (reels-prev-btn, reels-next-btn). Testimonials: customer circle photo visible, prev/next arrows (testimonial-prev, testimonial-next), 5 dot indicators. ReadyToPaintBanner: full-width, 'Ready to Paint?' heading, two CTAs (Call Now, Get Directions). No watermark/badge found. Mobile 390px: hamburger (mobile-menu-toggle) shows/opens all nav links. Hero readable at mobile. All navbar links present.

feature_test_results.hero_first_slide_title: PASS - 'More Than a Café — It's an Experience'
feature_test_results.hero_carousel_prev_next: PASS - Slides changed to 'Every Session Is a Story' and 'Paint. Laugh. Remember.'
feature_test_results.experiences_bento_4_photos: PASS - 4 cards: Painting Sessions, Date Night, Friends Outing, Chill Time with real photos
feature_test_results.gallery_18_images: PASS - 18 images confirmed in masonry grid
feature_test_results.reels_instagram_iframes: PASS - 13 Instagram embed iframes in horizontal scroll
feature_test_results.testimonials_customer_photos: PASS - Circle customer photo visible alongside review text
feature_test_results.testimonials_carousel_arrows: PASS - testimonial-prev and testimonial-next buttons present
feature_test_results.ready_to_paint_banner: PASS - Full-width section, 'Ready to Paint?' heading, Call Now + Get Directions CTAs
feature_test_results.no_watermark: PASS - No badge/watermark found on page
feature_test_results.mobile_hamburger_390px: PASS - Hamburger (mobile-menu-toggle) visible and opens mobile nav with all links
feature_test_results.mobile_hero_readable: PASS - Hero content clearly readable at 390px
feature_test_results.navbar_links: PASS - All navbar links visible: About, Experiences, Menu, Gallery, Events, Reviews, Contact
